channel.title: Posts on blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on blog

item.title: Hello World!
item.description: Changed from wordpress to static site using the hugo static site generator. probably going to be infrequently updated or abandoned. additionally vim is not the best for writing blogs. The reason why I decided against wordpress was the overhead of hostsing. I can serve thousands of page views on a static site no problem but if I try to serve more than 10 at a time on my old macbook server it would bog down (not that anyone would read this blog).
